reviews.comment:
Muy rico café personal muy amable. Llegué a las 7 y 10 de la mañana y todavía no había medialunas.

(Translated by Google)
The coffee was delicious, and the staff was very friendly. I arrived at 7:10 in the morning and there were still no croissants.

reviewReply.comment: Buen día caballero, nuestro horario de ingreso es a las 7:00 AM por eso mismo no  teníamos stock de medialunas, vamos a buscar una alternativa para poder revertir esta situación, lo esperamos nuevamente!

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, lovely views from the station. Today, a young man and woman were serving us, and they were incredibly friendly. We also noticed the lounge was very clean and tidy.

reviews.comment:
Lugar tranquilo con varias opciones idealmente para viajeros ya que dispone de espacio aparte para trailero, remolque o casa rodante
Destaca por su ambiente limpio baños amplios y cómodo y buena atención
Inclusive al parecer hay para comer yo no entre al autoservicio pero imagina que es bueno también.
Si quieres descansar comer y estirar las piernas este es tu lugar para cargar combustible antes de retornar tu viaje.

(Translated by Google)
A quiet spot with several options, ideal for travelers, as it has a separate area for trucks, trailers, or RVs. It stands out for its clean environment, spacious and comfortable restrooms, and good service. There even seems to be a place to eat; I didn't go into the drive-thru, but I imagine it's good too. If you want to rest, eat, and stretch your legs, this is the place to refuel before continuing your trip.

reviewReply.comment: Buen día Reyes García, la próxima te esperamos en el full para ofrecerte promos en cafeteria o comida elaborada. Desde ya muchas gracias por su comentario tan positivo. Te esperamos nuevamente !

(Translated by Google)

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por tu visita, te esperamos nuevamente Rodrigo !
